history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Welcome! What type of food would you like today? We have Our World Famous Fries available.

history.speaker: client
history.text: Hello, I'm lactose intolerant so I can't have dairy. Could you recommend a hearty meal for me?

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: I see Chicken McNuggets are available without dairy, so they're safe for your lactose intolerance. Would you like the standard or larger portion? Also, would you like to add drinks or fries with your order?

history.speaker: client
history.text: I'll take the larger portion of Chicken McNuggets, a large order of Our World Famous Fries, and a soda.

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: I'm sorry, Chicken McNuggets aren't available right now. We have Our World Famous Fries in large sizes. Would you like to go with a large order of fries and a soda?

history.speaker: client
history.text: I need a main item—could you recommend something else? I'm lactose intolerant.

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: I'm sorry, we don't have any main items available that are dairy-free right now. Would you like to try a large order of fries instead?

history.speaker: client
history.text: I need a main item—I'm lactose intolerant. Do you have any dairy-free burgers or sandwiches available?

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: We don't have any dairy-free burgers or sandwiches available right now. Would you like to go with a large order of fries instead?

history.speaker: client
history.text: I need a main item—I'm lactose intolerant. Can you check if there's any dairy-free option available?

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: We don't have any dairy-free main items available right now. Would you like a large order of fries instead?

history.speaker: client
history.text: I need a dairy-free main item—I'm lactose intolerant. Could you please check if you have any options available? I'm quite hungry.

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: We don't have any dairy-free main items available right now. Would you like a large order of fries instead to help you eat while you wait?

history.speaker: client
history.text: I'm lactose intolerant and need a main item—could you check if any dairy-free options are available? I'm quite hungry.

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: We have a dairy-free main item available: Chicken McNuggets. Would you like the larger portion? Also, would you like a large order of fries and a soda?

history.speaker: client
history.text: Okay, I'm lactose intolerant. I'll take the larger Chicken McNuggets, large fries, and a soda. That should be hearty for me.

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Your order is confirmed: 1 large portion of Chicken McNuggets, 1 large order of Our World Famous Fries, and 1 soda. Is that correct?

history.speaker: client
history.text: Yes, that's correct. Thank you for your help—I'm lactose intolerant so this should be safe.

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Your order is safe for lactose intolerance: 1 large Chicken McNuggets, 1 large order of Our World Famous Fries, and 1 soda. Have a great meal! Thank you for choosing McDonald's.

history.speaker: client
history.text: Thank you! This should be safe for my lactose intolerance. I'm hungry so I'll enjoy it.
